title: acalypha fruticosa
intro: Acalypha fruticosa, also known as the bitter leaf or African tea plant, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa, characterized by its small, rounded leaves and clusters of tiny yellow flowers. The leaves of Acalypha fruticosa have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and aiding in the management of conditions such as hypertension and diabetes. Acalypha fruticosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often consumed for their medicinal and health-promoting properties.
